name: Kung Pao Chicken #3
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine sauce ingredients; set aside.
2. In a medium bowl, mix cornstarch, soy sauce, and dry sherry with chicken strips. Gently coat the chicken and set aside.
3. Heat 2 tablespoons oil in a large nonstick skillet or wok. Stir-fry dried red chilies and roasted peanuts until the peanuts start to brown. Remove the peanut mixture and set aside.
4. Add the chicken mixture to the skillet and stir-fry until the chicken is no longer pink in the center. Remove the chicken and set aside.
5. In the same skillet, heat 2 tablespoons oil. Stir-fry sliced water chestnuts, bell pepper, bamboo shoots, garlic, and ginger for 1 minute.
6. Add the sauce to the vegetables and stir until thick and bubbly.
7. Return the chicken, chilies, and peanuts to the skillet. Add green onions and cook until thoroughly heated, stirring occasionally.
Typed by Syd Bigger.
